name: Greg Becker
bio: Greg Becker served as the President and CEO of SVB Financial Group and Silicon Valley Bank until the institution was taken over by regulators in March 2023.
_evidence: As the CEO, his leadership and risk management decisions directly precipitated the bank's liquidity crisis and subsequent collapse.

name: Martin Gruenberg
bio: Martin Gruenberg is a long-serving member and Chairman of the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC), responsible for managing bank failures.
_evidence: He oversaw the federal intervention and the decision to guarantee deposits to prevent systemic contagion in the banking sector.

name: Janet Yellen
bio: Janet Yellen is the 78th United States Secretary of the Treasury and former Chair of the Federal Reserve.
_evidence: She played a critical role in authorizing the systemic risk exception that allowed the government to protect uninsured depositors.
